title: Position Paper on the Licensing Approach to Internet Protocol Based Voice and Messaging Services
summary: Clarifies licensing treatment for IP-based voice and messaging services in Bahrain and is directly relevant to OTT and digitally delivered communication services operating through telecom networks.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Sets TRA approach to IP-based voice and messaging services.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Telecommunications Law and licence framework
